data.body: [enwiki] Color difference — /* CIELAB ΔE* */ Edited the CIEDE2000 formula, specifically the "h1Prime" and "h2Prime" formulas. Previously, the "Mod" function was used. The "Mod" function produces incorrect values when atan2(b1*, a1Prime) or atan2(b2*, a2Prime) is negative. The revised formula is consistent with Sharma's (2005) calculation of "h1Prime" and "h2Prime".
data.title: Color difference
